MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Emily C. Wecht, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Rosa Diaz
Tom Sloan & Kathy K. Lee Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Anthony Foster

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Rosa Diaz's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Form Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 12.2, 12.3, and 12.4. Defendant's objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses that were made are inadequate as they limit the responses to actions taken by Anthony Foster personally. Additionally, the responses are inadequate as they reserve the right to supplement.
Defendant is ordered to respond further within 10 days of notice of this order.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Nos. 13, 14, and 17 as any responsive documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. The responses are inadequate as they limit the responses to actions taken by Anthony Foster personally. Additionally, the responses are inadequate as they reserve the right to supplement. The motion is denied as to No. 21 as it is overly broad.
Further responses and a privilege log shall be made within 10 days of notice of this order.
Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Pltf'S Motion To Commpel Deft Jacote'S Responses To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Statement Of Item In Disputed, Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration Of Douglas S. Saeltzer In Support; Statement Of Request For Production Of Documents Ind Dispute
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Douglas S. Saeltzer, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Rosa Diaz
Eric J. Bengtson, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Jean Jacote
Tom Sloan, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Anthony Foster

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Rosa Diaz's Motion To Compel Defendant Jacote's Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production of Documents, Set One, is granted as the court finds that the statement is qualified work product. Defendant is ordered to produce the statement for in camera review to determine whether the statement in any way reflects the impressions, conclusions, opinions, or legal research or theories which would not be discoverable - production of documents within 5 days of notice of order.COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
